children.text: Anyway, I'm writing because I've got some really exciting news.
children.cn: 不管怎样，我写信是因为我有一些非常令人兴奋的消息。

children.text: You won't believe it, but my parents are taking me to Beijing this summer!
children.cn: 你不会相信的，但我父母今年夏天要带我去北京！

children.text: Beijing is a fascinating city with a long history.
children.cn: 北京是一个历史悠久的迷人城市。

children.text: Although the weather will be quite hot, I'm really looking forward to exploring the Forbidden City.
children.cn: 虽然天气会很热，但我真的很期待去探索紫禁城。

children.text: Furthermore, I'm definitely going to climb the Great Wall and take lots of photos.
children.cn: 此外，我肯定会去爬长城并拍很多照片。

children.text: As a result, I'll need a lot of space on my phone!
children.cn: 结果，我手机上需要很多空间！

children.text: We're staying in a hotel near the city centre for a fortnight.
children.cn: 我们要住在市中心附近的一家旅馆，待两周。

children.text: My favourite part of the trip will be trying the local food like Peking Duck.
children.cn: 旅途中我最喜欢的部分将是品尝像北京烤鸭这样的当地美食。

children.text: By the way, do you want to meet up before I go?
children.cn: 顺便说一下，在我走之前你想见面吗？
children.keywords: By the way, meet up, before
